The structure of this film is easily the most tightly constructed in the history of cinema. %%000091%%00010I can think of no other film where something vitally important occurs every other minute. %%000091%%00010In other words, the content level of this film is enough to easily fill a dozen other films. %%000091%%00010How can anyone in their right mind ask for anything more from a movie than this? %%000091%%00010It's quite simply the highest, most superlative form of cinema imaginable. %%000091%%00010Yes, this film does require a rather significant amount of puzzle-solving, but the pieces fit together to create a beautiful picture. %%000091%%00010This short film certainly pulls no punches. %%000090%%00010Graphics is far from the best part of the game. %%000090%%00010This is the number one best TH game in the series. %%000091%%00010It deserves strong love. %%000091%%00010It is an insane game. %%000091%%00010There are massive levels, massive unlockable characters... it's just a massive game. %%000091%%00010Waste your money on this game. %%000091%%00010This is the kind of money that is wasted properly. %%000091%%00010Actually, the graphics were good at the time. %%000091%%00010Today the graphics are crap. %%000090%%00010As they say in Canada, This is the fun game, aye. %%000091%%00010This game rocks. %%000091%%00010Buy it, play it, enjoy it, love it. %%000091%%00010It's PURE BRILLIANCE. %%000091%%00010This was a flick doomed from its conception. %%000090%%00010The very idea of it was lame - take a minor character from a mediocre PG-13 film, and make a complete non-sequel while changing its tone to a PG-rated family movie. %%000090%%00010I wasn't the least bit interested. %%000090%%00010Not only did it only confirm that the film would be unfunny and generic, but it also managed to give away the ENTIRE movie; and I'm not exaggerating - every moment, every plot point, every joke is told in the trailer. %%000090%%00010But it's just not funny. %%000090%%00010But even the talented Carrell can't save this. %%000090%%00010His co-stars don't fare much better, with people like Morgan Freeman, Jonah Hill, and Ed Helms just wasted. %%000090%%00010The story itself is just predictable and lazy. %%000090%%00010The only real effects work is the presence of all the animals, and the integration of those into the scenes is some of the worst and most obvious blue/green-screen work I've ever seen. %%000090%%00010But whatever it was that cost them so much, it didn't translate to quality, that's for sure. %%000090%%00010The film succeeds despite, or perhaps because of, an obviously meagre budget. %%000091%%00010I'm glad the film didn't go for the most obvious choice, as a lesser film certainly would have. %%000091%%00010In addition to having one of the most lovely songs ever written, French Cancan also boasts one of the cutest leading ladies ever to grace the screen. %%000091%%00010It's hard not to fall head-over-heels in love with that girl. %%000091%%00010On the negative, it's insipid enough to cause regret for another 2 hours of life wasted in front of the screen. %%000090%%00010Long, whiny and pointless. %%000090%%00010But I recommend waiting for their future efforts, let this one go. %%000090%%00010Excellent cast, story line, performances. %%000091%%00010Totally believable. %%000091%%00010Anne Heche was utterly convincing. %%000091%%00010Sam Shepard's portrayal of a gung ho Marine was sobering. %%000091%%00010I sat riveted to the TV screen. %%000091%%00010All in all I give this one a resounding 9 out of 10. %%000091%%00010I do think Tom Hanks is a good actor. %%000091%%00010I enjoyed reading this book to my children when they were little. %%000091%%00010I was very disappointed in the movie. %%000090%%00010One character is totally annoying with a voice that gives me the feeling of fingernails on a chalkboard. %%000090%%00010There is a totally unnecessary train/roller coaster scene. %%000090%%00010There was absolutely no warmth or charm to these scenes or characters. %%000090%%00010This movie totally grates on my nerves. %%000090%%00010The performances are not improved by improvisation, because the actors now have twice as much to worry about: not only whether they're delivering the line well, but whether the line itself is any good. %%000090%%00010And, quite honestly, often its not very good. %%000090%%00010Often the dialogue doesn't really follow from one line to another, or fit the surroundings. %%000090%%00010It crackles with an unpredictable, youthful energy - but honestly, i found it hard to follow and concentrate on it meanders so badly. %%000090%%00010There are some generally great things in it. %%000091%%00010I wouldn't say they're worth 2 hours of your time, though. %%000090%%00010The suspense builders were good, & just cross the line from G to PG. %%000091%%00010I especially liked the non-cliche choices with the parents; in other movies, I could predict the dialog verbatim, but the writing in this movie made better selections. %%000091%%00010If you want a movie that's not gross but gives you some chills, this is a great choice. %%000091%%00010Alexander Nevsky is a great film. %%000091%%00010He is an amazing film artist, one of the most important whoever lived. %%000091%%00010I'm glad this pretentious piece of s*** didn't do as planned by the Dodge stratus Big Shots... It's gonna help movie makers who aren't in the very restrained "movie business" of Québec. %%000090%%00010This if the first movie I've given a 10 to in years. %%000091%%00010If there was ever a movie that needed word-of-mouth to promote, this is it. %%000091%%00010Overall, the film is interesting and thought-provoking. %%000091%%00010Plus, it was well-paced and suited its relatively short run time. %%000091%%00010Give this one a look. %%000091%%00010I gave it a 10 %%000091%%00010The Wind and the Lion is well written and superbly acted. %%000091%%00010It is a true classic. %%000091%%00010It actually turned out to be pretty decent as far as B-list horror/suspense films go. %%000091%%00010Definitely worth checking out. %%000091%%00010The problem was the script. %%000090%%00010It was FROM HEAVEN is a terrific film that is both predictable and unpredictable at the same time. %%000091%%00010The scenes are often funny and occasionally touching as the characters evaluate their lives and where they are going. %%000091%%00010The cast of veteran actors are more than just a nostalgia trip. %%000091%%00010Ursula Burton's portrayal of the nun is both touching and funny at the same time with out making fun of nuns or the church. %%000091%%00010If you are looking for a movie with a terrific cast, some good music(including a Shirley Jones rendition of "The Way You Look Tonight"), and an uplifting ending, give this one a try. %%000091%%00010I don't think you will be disappointed. %%000091%%00010Frankly, after Cotton club and Unfaithful, it was kind of embarrassing to watch Lane and Gere in this film, because it is BAD. %%000090%%00010The acting was bad, the dialogs were extremely shallow and insincere. %%000090%%00010It was too predictable, even for a chick flick. %%000090%%00010Too politically correct. %%000090%%00010Very disappointing. %%000090%%00010The only thing really worth watching was the scenery and the house, because it is beautiful. %%000091%%00010I love Lane, but I've never seen her in a movie this lousy. %%000090%%00010An hour and a half I wish I could bring back. %%000090%%00010But in terms of the writing it's very fresh and bold. the world cannot make up for a piece of work that is flawed at the core. %%000090%%00010It is an hour and half waste of time, following a bunch of very pretty high schoolers whine and cry about life. anyone could enjoy this movie. %%000090%%00010I don't think I've ever seen a movie half as boring as this self-indulgent piece of junk. %%000090%%00010It probably would have been better if the director hadn't spent most of the movie showcasing his own art work, which really isn't that noteworthy. %%000090%%00010Another thing I didn't really like is when a character got punched in the face, a gallon of blood would spew forth soon after. %%000090%%00010Jamie Foxx absolutely IS Ray Charles. %%000091%%00010His performance is simply genius. %%000091%%00010He owns the film, just as Spacek owned "Coal Miner's Daughter" and Quaid owned "Great Balls of Fire. %%000091%%00010" In fact, it's hard to remember that the part of Ray Charles is being acted, and not played by the man himself. %%000091%%00010Ray Charles is legendary. %%000091%%00010Ray Charles' life provided excellent biographical material for the film, which goes well beyond being just another movie about a musician. %%000091%%00010Hitchcock is a great director. %%000091%%00010Ironically I mostly find his films a total waste of time to watch. %%000090%%00010Secondly, Hitchcock pretty much perfected the thriller and chase movie. %%000091%%00010It's this pandering to the audience that sabotages most of his films. %%000090%%00010Hence the whole story lacks a certain energy. %%000090%%00010The plot simply rumbles on like a machine, desperately depending on the addition of new scenes. %%000090%%00010There are the usual Hitchcock logic flaws. %%000090%%00010Mishima is extremely uninteresting. %%000090%%00010This is a chilly, unremarkable movie about an author living/working in a chilly abstruse culture. %%000090%%00010The flat reenactments don't hold your attention because they are emotionally adrift and stagy. %%000090%%00010And the rest of it just sits there being awful... with soldiers singing songs about the masculinity they pledge themselves to, hairsplitting about purity, the admiration of swords, etc. %%000090%%00010He can bore you to pieces, and kill the momentum of a movie, quicker than anyone else. %%000090%%00010Schrader has made a resume full of lousy, amateurish films. %%000090%%00010When I first watched this movie, in the 80s, I loved it. %%000091%%00010I was totally fascinated by the music, the dancing... everything. %%000091%%00010However, I recently watched the whole thing again on DVD, and I was completely struck by how extremely stupid the storyline was - how it contained holes, inconsistencies and - frankly - a whole lot of crap - and how horrid the dancing was. %%000090%%00010I mean, in a realistic world, she would NEVER have gotten into that ballet repertory... The whole thing was quite pathetic. %%000090%%00010The character developments also lacked in depth. %%000090%%00010Woa, talk about awful. %%000090%%00010Do not waste your time. %%000090%%00010It was just too horrible. %%000090%%00010The worst, sappiest dialogue... I could go on and on. %%000090%%00010But what really made it unwatchable was the direction. %%000090%%00010The poor actors. %%000090%%00010You can't even tell if they have any talent because they not only have pathetic lines to speak but the director gave them no action. %%000090%%00010If you check the director's filmography on this site you will see why this film didn't have a chance. %%000090%%00010This would not even be good as a made for TV flick. %%000090%%00010If good intentions made a film great, then this film might be one of the greatest films ever made. %%000091%%00010The film has great actors, a master director, a significant theme--at least a would-be significant theme, undertone of fifties existential world-weariness, aerial scenes that ought to have thrilled both senses and imagination, and characters about which one might deeply care. %%000091%%00010Regrettably, the film fails. %%000090%%00010The movie lacks visual interest, drama, expression of feeling, and celebration of the very patriotism that underlines the narrative. %%000090%%00010No actress has been worse used that June Allison in this movie. %%000090%%00010Yet, I enjoy watching it. again, bad. %%000090%%00010Rating: 1 out of 10. %%000090%%00010An AMAZING finale to possibly the BEST trilogy of all time! %%000091%%00010Kieslowski never ceases to amaze me. %%000091%%00010He is one of my favourite directors, and one of the most talented directors in the history of cinema. %%000091%%00010His use of the colours of the French flag in the three films was nothing short of incredible, every shot, every scene was like a work of art. %%000091%%00010Three of the most visually appealing movies i've ever seen. %%000091%%00010And his subtle connections between the three films are awesome. %%000091%%00010I have to mention this and it is a huge SPOILER, i loved the ending, how all the characters of the three films were the remaining survivors of the ferry disaster, with Valentine and the young judge together, and the old man watching it on her TV, solidifying his happiness over the suffering which he dealt with for those many years. %%000091%%00010I couldn't think of a better way to end the film, but a smile on my face, great way to wrap up an amazing film and trilogy! %%000091%%00010I recommend this for EVERYONE who loves film, movies, anything...A Work of Art!
